goal: a.subset(b) = forall(x0: S) { a.contains(x0) implies b.contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[S](a, b)

(forall(x0: S) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ b } = true)

goal: subsemigroup_closure_contains(a, x) = forall(x0: Subsemigroup[S]) { set_subset_subsemigroup[S](a, x0) implies x0.contains(x) }
proof: function[T0: Semigroup](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0) { forall(x2: Subsemigroup[T0]) { not set_subset_subsemigroup[T0](x0, x2) or x1 ∈ x2 } = subsemigroup_closure_contains[T0](x0, x1) }[S](a, x)
set_subset_subsemigroup[S](a, s)
subsemigroup_closure_contains(a, x)
(forall(x0: Subsemigroup[S]) { not set_subset_subsemigroup[S](a, x0) or x ∈ x0 } = true)
function(x0: Subsemigroup[S]) { not (set_subset_subsemigroup[S](a, x0) and not x ∈ x0) }(s)

function(x0: Subsemigroup[S]) { not set_subset_subsemigroup[S](a, x0) or x * y ∈ x0 }(w0)

let w1: S satisfy { subsemigroup_closure_contains(a, w0) and subsemigroup_closure_contains(a, w1) and not subsemigroup_closure_contains(a, w0 * w1) }
let w2: S satisfy { subsemigroup_closure_contains(a, w0) and subsemigroup_closure_contains(a, w2) and not subsemigroup_closure_contains(a, w0 * w2) }
function(x0: S, x1: S) { not subsemigroup_closure_contains(a, x0) or not subsemigroup_closure_contains(a, x1) or subsemigroup_closure_contains(a, x0 * x1) }(w0, w2)

function[T0: Semigroup](x0: Subsemigroup[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { Option.some[Subsemigroup[T0]](x0) != Subsemigroup.new[T0](x1) or x2 ∈ x0 = x1(x2) }[S](subsemigroup_closure[S](a), subsemigroup_closure_contains[S](a), x)

function[T0](x0: Set[T0] -> Set[T0]) { (is_subset_monotone_map[T0, T0](x0) and is_set_extensive_map[T0](x0) and is_set_idempotent_map[T0](x0)) = is_set_closure_operator[T0](x0) }[S](subsemigroup_set_closure[S])

goal: exists(k0: Set[S]) { k0.is_finite and subsemigroup_closure[S](k0) = s }
proof: function(x0: Set[S]) { not (x0.is_finite and subsemigroup_closure[S](x0) = s) }(a)
